Genesis 24

A Wife for Isaac

NoteThat is, Mesopotamia; Aram-naharaim means Aram of the two rivers, likely the region between the Euphrates and Balih Rivers in northwestern Mesopotamia.

Rebekah Is Chosen

NoteA beka is half a shekel, or approximately 0.2 ounces or 5.7 grams. Note10 shekels is approximately 4 ounces or 114 grams.

Isaac Marries Rebekah
